VERSION: 1.4.2
STATUS: stable
LAST_UPDATED: 2026-05-04

name: Versioning

on:
  push:
    paths:
      - docs/VERSION.md

jobs:
  versioning:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Read version
        run: |
          VERSION=$(cat docs/VERSION.md | grep VERSION | awk '{print $2}')
          echo "Current Version: $VERSION"
      - name: Update Version
        run: |
          # Implement version update logic here.

name: Tagging

on:
  push:
    paths:
      - docs/VERSION.md

jobs:
  tagging:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Create Tag
        run: |
          TAG=$(cat docs/VERSION.md | grep VERSION | awk '{print $2}')
          git tag -a "$TAG" -m "Release version $TAG"
          git push origin "$TAG"

name: Release Notes

on:
